The '''Binarian sabercat''' was a predator native to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Binaros]] in the [[Kathol Outback/Legends|Kathol Outback]]. A huge [[Feline/Legends|feline]] animal, the sabercat had eight powerful legs tipped with large paws ending in razor-sharp claws. The sabercat was able to bring four of these paws to bear on an opponent at any time. Huge incisors gave the sabercat a vicious bite. The sabercat also had a two-meter tail that ended in a bony tip. While dangerous looking, the sabercat did not use the tail to attack prey. Instead, it was used in the sabercat's mating rituals. Typical sabercats had thick brown-tan fur with green splotches. The coloration of the fur assisted the predator in stalking prey by giving it a natural camouflage.

In [[8 ABY/Legends|8 ABY]], the [[Defel/Legends|Defel]] [[Kl'aal]] cornered and killed a Binarian sabercat on Binaros during the layover of the ''[[FarStar]]'' on the planet.
